name: Sri Lanka Curried Leeks
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the leeks and cut off the green part into 1 cm slices. Cut the stalks into 5 mm slices.
2. Chop the onions and chiles.
3. In a pan, sauté the chopped onions and chiles until fragrant.
4. Add the sliced leeks, turmeric, salt, and curry leaf sprigs to the pan. Stir well.
5. Pour in the thin coconut milk and bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and simmer until the gravy has reduced slightly.
7. Stir in the thick coconut milk and return to a gentle boil.
8. Just before serving, sprinkle 1/4 teaspoon of curry powder over the dish.
